\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4599 introduces Curvature Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \kappa_{\text{CV}} := \lim_{n \to \infty} \frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n \Omega_i^\star \]
